name: Panim Haven
approach: Temples, ritual logistics, and funerary commerce shape the city.
inside: Offerings, mediation, coffins, and divine-balance services dominate.
who_is_out_of_place: those mocking afterlife commerce or divine mediation

sensory_surface.detail: Temples, ritual logistics, and funerary commerce shape the city.
Offerings, mediation, coffins, and divine-balance services dominate.

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually clerics, funerary workers, pilgrims, and public conduct is read through expectations such as ritual seriousness and respectful petition.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by House Panim.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as divine balance obligations begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Panim Haven stands apart because its economy leans on afterlife preparations, offerings; public faith remains visible through very high; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble those mocking afterlife commerce or divine mediation.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Panim Haven begin through metropolis rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
scene_openers: A first arrival at Panim Haven immediately highlights afterlife-service and divine mediation metropolis
The quickest social read of Panim Haven comes from how locals react to ritual seriousness and respectful petition.
social_misstep_examples: Treating Panim Haven like a casual stop rather than a governed space.
Ignoring local expectation to ritual seriousness and respectful petition.
low_grade_conflict_triggers: A queue, toll, or inspection dispute tied to afterlife preparations.
A local intermediary resents outsider assumptions about Panim Haven.
institutional_escalation_path: Workshop or neighborhood correction in Panim Haven
Escalation into law, tariff, or faction attention if ignored
outsider_advantage: Outsiders can sometimes notice pressure fractures in Panim Haven before residents admit them.
outsider_liability: Outsiders in Panim Haven are judged quickly by whether they understand its governing rhythms.
public_complication_table: A minor official wants paperwork clarified.
A public argument exposes pressure around divine balance obligations.
Someone mistakes the party for agents tied to House Panim.
A delay at a gate, quay, shrine, or market creates heat.
A small errand reveals a larger local imbalance.
private_pressure_table: A household or guild contact is quietly overextended.
A local fixer asks for help with a contained problem.
A hidden cost behind afterlife preparations surfaces.
A trusted intermediary is being watched.
A faith, law, or trade obligation has slipped.
A personal favor could become a faction debt.

arrival_variants_by_time.dawn: At dawn, Panim Haven feels procedural and watchful as daily rhythms set.
arrival_variants_by_time.midday: By midday, Panim Haven is busiest and least forgiving of confusion.
arrival_variants_by_time.night: At night, Panim Haven reveals who really moves after formal structures thin out.

recent_local_change_signal: Locals in Panim Haven mention that something small but important has changed in the last few weeks, even if they refuse to name it directly.
